family_focus: Rewrite robotic source text into more natural prose while preserving meaning.
task_shape: Input document transformation with tone and style goals.
selection_reason: Kept because the useful task shape is strong even though the original source mentions a specific install flow. In this library it serves as a style-rewrite reference.
constraints: keep the key points while making the prose more natural

variants.summary: Rewrite an AI-sounding blog draft into more natural human-sounding prose.
